data.body: #685 PS4 (8d8e local-verify hardening: subject-binding + payload-sourcing, 7 new binding tests, cross-ticket/kind replay rejected, neutralization teeth 6/7) + #686 PS2 (ee0b rebased) pushed. 492/26 tests green locally. Plan: on green, close 8d8e+ee0b, then LAND #664<-#685<-#686 stack (all green, additive, regression-safe) to shrink the stack before 8f1d/76d2/6a89.
